description: SIC! (Simple Image Converter) — an accessible image format converter for Windows. Converts between JPG, PNG, WEBP, ICO, BMP, TIFF, GIF, and AVIF, with optional resizing.
notes: SIC! runs in portable mode under Scoop. Your config, converted files, and logs are persisted in '~/scoop/persist/sic/userdata/' and survive updates.
To also wipe persisted user data on uninstall, run: scoop uninstall -p sic
